channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 AprilNEA/OpenLogi (5189 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: AprilNEA

📝 Repository: AprilNEA/OpenLogi

📄 Descrizione: ⚡️A native, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+, written in Rust 🦀 — remap buttons, DPI, and SmartShift over HID++. No account, no telemetry.

⭐ Stelle: 5189

🍴 Forks: 98

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: dpi gpui hid hidpp local-first logitech logitech-mouse logitech-options mouse-remapping mx-master privacy rust smartshift

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-24T10:10:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-21T06:41:03Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 deeplethe/forkd (1948 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: deeplethe

📝 Repository: deeplethe/forkd

📄 Descrizione: Fork() for AI agent microVMs. Spawn 100 children in ~100ms from a warm parent; BRANCH a live VM in ~150ms. KVM-isolated, snapshot CoW.

⭐ Stelle: 1948

🍴 Forks: 150

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents copy-on-write kvm microvm rust sandbox snapshot

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-11T17:42:24Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-09T05:45:12Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 ProxyShard/ShardBrowser (401 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ProxyShard

📝 Repository: ProxyShard/ShardBrowser

📄 Descrizione: Free, open-source anti-detect browser launcher for web scraping and multi-accounting. By the ProxyShard team. Engine-level fingerprint spoofing in Chromium 148 (WebGL / WebGPU / Client Hints / fonts / TLS), 170+ device profiles bundled, stable QUIC + WebRTC over SOCKS5.

⭐ Stelle: 401

🍴 Forks: 63

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents anti-detect-browser antidetect-browser browser-fingerprinting chromium fingerprint headless-browser headless-chrome multi-accounting playwright proxy proxyshard puppeteer quic stealth-browser tauri udp web-scraping webrtc webscraping

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-30T23:05:14Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-20T14:35:37Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 tuchg/Lucarne (291 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tuchg

📝 Repository: tuchg/Lucarne

📄 Descrizione: Stop babysitting local AI agents. Just notifications, approve, and resume your Codex,Pi, or Claude code sessions anywhere. 0-Intrusion mobile control bridge via Telegram/微信/飞书. No hooks, no skills, no MCP.

⭐ Stelle: 291

🍴 Forks: 14

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: agent-bridge agent-im agent-management agent-sessions ai-agents claude-code codex gemini managed-agents notification pi remote-agents remote-control telegram-bot zero-intrusion

📜 Licenza: MIT License

📝 Repository: CodeBendKit/codeseek
